name: Context-first daily intake reconciliation
definitionOfDone: Project-local LINE intake loads same-conversation context before task judgment
Project-local LINE intake searches active total-control tasks before creating a new task
Existing related tasks are updated with source evidence instead of duplicated
Command, acknowledgement, duplicate, test, pure knowledge, and background messages are marked judged without task creation
Meeting checkbox tasks still enter as confirmed meeting tasks with meeting-reference deduplication
Post-run verification can identify whether the implementation is policy-compliant
